title: Northrop Grumman 2025 Software Engineer Intern Interview Questions & Practice

content:
# Northrop Grumman 2025 Software Engineer Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Northrop Grumman 2025 Software Engineer Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Plainview, NY
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Northrop Grumman
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Northrop Grumman is offering a 2025 Software Engineer Intern internship position in Plainview, NY. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Northrop Grumman's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Northrop Grumman interview and increase your chances of success.
